title: Productive Fitness Fighthrough Series Work Out Poster Laminated (6 Styles)
description:
The Productive Fitness Fighthrough Series Workout Poster is a convenient visual exercise guide for home gyms, fitness rooms and personal workout spaces. Measuring 18 x 24 inches, each laminated poster features clearly illustrated exercises with start and finish positions to help you follow along with confidence. Developed with fitness professionals and featuring certified trainers, this durable poster is available in six workout styles.

Productive Fitness Fighthrough Series Work Out Poster Laminated (6 Styles)
Train at home with the Productive Fitness Fighthrough Series Workout Poster. This laminated 18" x 24" exercise chart features easy-to-follow illustrations and exercise guidance to help support a variety of fitness routines. Available in six different styles to match your workout goals.
Key Features
  • EASY TO FOLLOW EXERCISES: Clearly illustrated movements with start and finish positions help guide your workout routine
  • LAMINATED FOR DURABILITY: Protective laminated finish resists everyday wear for long-lasting use in home gyms and fitness spaces
  • DEVELOPED WITH FITNESS EXPERTS: Professionally designed exercise routines created with guidance from experienced fitness professionals
  • CERTIFIED TRAINER DEMONSTRATIONS: Features certified trainers performing each exercise to provide clear visual instruction
  • 18 X 24 INCH WORKOUT POSTER: Large easy-to-read format is ideal for home gyms fitness rooms garages and personal workout areas
Specifications
MPN: 30082
Poster Size: 18" x 24"
Material: Laminated Paper
Orientation: Portrait
Stay motivated and keep your workouts on track with the Productive Fitness Fighthrough Series Workout Poster. Designed as an easy-to-reference fitness guide, this laminated exercise chart provides clear illustrations and step-by-step exercise positions to support your workout routine at home or in the gym.

Each 18 x 24 inch poster is professionally designed with guidance from fitness experts and features certified trainers demonstrating proper exercise positioning. The laminated finish helps protect the poster from everyday wear, making it a durable addition to home gyms, fitness studios, garages or workout spaces.

Available in six unique workout styles, the Fighthrough Series allows you to choose the exercise routine that best fits your training goals. Whether you're building a home gym, adding instructional fitness décor or looking for a practical gift for an active lifestyle, this laminated workout poster provides an easy visual reference whenever you train.
